title: Why India Is Quietly Leading the AI Race?
description:
EY has released its 2025 Work Reimagined survey.
India scored 53 on the AI Advantage Index, far above the global average of 34.
This isn’t about AI hype. It measures real outcomes like time saved, productivity, and decision quality at work.
The question now is whether this lead can last without deeper skill-building.
